name: button-secondary
visual_summary: The button-secondary component is a visually less prominent button type that can be used to display a secondary call-to-action on a webpage. It is typically displayed next to a primary button and used for less important actions. Developers would use this component when they need a secondary button with a distinct visual design.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready button component with the following characteristics:

Name: button-secondary
Description: The button-secondary component is a visually less prominent button type that can be used to display a secondary call-to-action on a webpage. It is typically displayed next to a primary button and used for less important actions. Developers would use this component when they need a secondary button with a distinct visual design.
Style: flat, minimal, text-based
Interactions: clickable, tappable
Tags: button, secondary, CTA

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
